name: Prasad Gade Portfolio
description: Personal portfolio agent for Prasad Gade — data scientist and computer engineer from Mumbai, India. Provides structured access to slim and detailed resume data, the 11-project public portfolio set, strict MAIN_RESUME skills, contact information, and personality data via static JSON API.

skills.name: Get Primary Resume
skills.description: Retrieve the primary slim resume data including education, work summary, 11 public projects, MAIN_RESUME skills, and core certifications
examples: Show me Prasad's main work summary

skills.name: Get Master Resume
skills.description: Retrieve the detailed master resume data including diploma education, TA/research role, publications, leadership, richer certifications, and the same 11 public projects
examples: What are Prasad's publications and leadership roles?

skills.name: Get Projects
skills.description: Retrieve all 11 public projects with descriptions, tech stacks, metrics, and links
examples: Show me public data science projects

skills.name: Get Skills
skills.description: Retrieve technical skills using the strict MAIN_RESUME taxonomy across 6 categories
examples: What programming languages does Prasad know?

skills.name: Get Contact Info
skills.description: Retrieve contact details and 11 social media profile links

skills.name: Get About Info
skills.description: Retrieve personality traits, hobbies, site philosophy, and favorite movies and songs
